evidence.evidence_text: Reference mixtures REF-0.40 to REF-0.60 list water/cement, water, cement, sand, fine gravel, gravel, and superplasticizer.
FR mixtures list water/cement, water, cement, sand, finer coarse recycled aggregate, gravel, and superplasticizer.
CR mixtures list water/cement, water, cement, sand, fine gravel, coarse recycled aggregate, and superplasticizer.
Fifteen 100 mm cubic specimens per concrete mixture were wet cured at 20 C; compressive strength evaluated after 28 days of wet curing according to UNI EN 12390-3.
evidence.supports: curing, specimen geometry, and test method

evidence.evidence_text: Compressive strengths and elastic modulus after 28 days: mean compressive strength and standard deviation for REF, FR, and CR mixtures.
